_description: Modern multi-root mode — multiple source folders, auto-detect columns, optional recursive search.
_comment_roots: local_file_root (legacy) is still supported alongside local_file_roots.
Roots are tried in order: first match wins.
UNC paths work fine on Windows: \\fileserver\shares\docs
_comment_resolution: auto_detect_file_columns: true means the importer scans the XLSX header row
and maps columns by header name (Hungarian and English aliases built-in).
recursive_file_search: false — set to true to allow deep folder walks.
file_column_aliases: add project-specific header names not in the built-in list.
_comment_file_columns: file_columns can be empty ({}) when auto_detect_file_columns is true.
Any index you DO specify here overrides auto-detection for that field only.
Useful when one column is ambiguous but others are detected fine.
